title: Swiss Society
description: A Modpack meant for my Minecraft Server and free to use for others. Comes with a datapack, resource pack, and configs that changes/fixes a multitude of recipes and spawnrates.
body:
A Modpack meant for my Minecraft Server and free to use for others. 
Comes with a datapack, resource pack, and configs that changes/fixes a multitude of recipes and spawnrates.

Noteworthy Changes to this modpack's progression:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- ComputerCraft recipes are more complex using Create Mod items and crafting methods.
- Toms Storage uses Create Mod items for crafting.
- Void Ingots from Create Utilities are crafted using Spelunkery's Dimensional Tears instead of Ender Pearls.
- Crafting Automats/Quark Crafters & Extractinators are only obtainable from Artifact Mod's Mimics or Mineshaft Chests.
- Coal can be compressed into Rough Diamond in a PneumaticCraft Pressure Chamber.
- Linked Storage Ender Chests & Tessaracts use Void Ingots for crafting.
- Andesite Alloy can no longer be crafted with Iron, you need Zinc.
- Rose Quartz is slightly more expensive to craft with redstone, you can alternatively craft them with Rough Cinnabar.
- Steel Ingots/Compressed Iron can be sanded into Iron Ingots for recycling.
- Dripstone can be automated by placing lava next to mud in-world.

</details>



Credits
